title: GoogleCloudHealthcareV1ConsentPolicy
description: Represents a user's consent in terms of the resources that can be accessed and under what conditions.

authorizationRule.description: Required. The request conditions to meet to grant access. In addition to any supported comparison operators, authorization rules may have `IN` operator as well as at most 10 logical operators that are limited to `AND` (`&&`), `OR` (`||`).

resourceAttributes.description: The resources that this policy applies to. A resource is a match if it matches all the attributes listed here. If empty, this policy applies to all User data mappings for the given user.
